SEARCH
Package Cli

Class HospitalCommands

java.lang.Object
Cli.HospitalCommands
public class HospitalCommands extends Object
Utility class that contains command line actions related to hospitals.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    add(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
    Adds a hospital to the map.
    static void
    list(VoronoiEngine engine)
    Lists all hospitals currently stored in the map.
    static void
    move(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
    Moves a hospital to a new position.
    static void
    nearest(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
    Finds the nearest hospital to a given point.
    static void
    remove(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
    Removes a hospital by its identifier.
    static void
    stats(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
    Shows statistics for a hospital.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • add

      public static void add(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
      Adds a hospital to the map. Usage: add-hospital <name> <x> <y> <capacity>.
      Parameters:
      parts - command parts entered by the user
      engine - the Voronoi engine used by the application

    • remove

      public static void remove(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
      Removes a hospital by its identifier. Usage: remove-hospital <id>.
      Parameters:
      parts - command parts entered by the user
      engine - the Voronoi engine used by the application

    • move

      public static void move(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
      Moves a hospital to a new position. Usage: move-hospital <id> <newX> <newY>.
      Parameters:
      parts - command parts entered by the user
      engine - the Voronoi engine used by the application

    • list

      public static void list(VoronoiEngine engine)
      Lists all hospitals currently stored in the map.
      Parameters:
      engine - the Voronoi engine used by the application

    • stats

      public static void stats(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
      Shows statistics for a hospital. Usage: stats <id>.
      Parameters:
      parts - command parts entered by the user
      engine - the Voronoi engine used by the application

    • nearest

      public static void nearest(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
      Finds the nearest hospital to a given point. Usage: nearest <x> <y>.
      Parameters:
      parts - command parts entered by the user
      engine - the Voronoi engine used by the application
